reason.default: Your application did not meet our current requirements.
reason.title: Reason

get.description: All astrologers with their onboarding stage, for the Kanban board.

post.description: Move an astrologer to a target onboarding stage and send the matching step email.

get.description:
Performance stats for an astrologer:
  - avg_online_hours_per_day_30d: rolling 30-day average daily online time
  - poor_chat_percentage: % of rated consultations with rating <= 2
  - first_user_repeat_percentage: % of "this astrologer was the seeker's very
    first consultation on the platform" seekers who came back to this astrologer again
  - loyal_user_percentage: % of this astrologer's unique seekers who returned within
    15 days of their first consultation with this astrologer AND stayed >10 min

post.description:
Create a Payout record. `amount` is the net amount after TDS and PG charge.
`tds_deducted` and `pg_charge_deducted` are withheld amounts for record-keeping.

get.description: Get all processed and generated payouts for admin reporting.

Calculate pending earnings for all astrologers including TDS deduction.
Formula: (Total Revenue * Commission %) - TDS (10% above ₹30k) - Already Paid.

post.description: Mark a payout as processed (money sent).

get.description: All wallet transactions for a given role (defaults to seekers), for admin auditing.

put.description: Allows an admin to directly reset any user's password and sends a notification email.

schema.title: Response Get User Wallet History Admin Users  User Id  Wallet History Get

post.description: Manually credit or debit a user's wallet. Positive amount = credit, negative = debit.

get.description:
How many free questions this identity has left. The chat endpoint
re-checks the same counter on every call, so this is purely informational.
Get payout history for the logged-in astrologer.

post.description: Seeker subscribes to be alerted when an offline astrologer comes online.

get.description: Fetch an astrologer profile by numeric user_id (legacy) or slug.

schema.title: Response Get Chat History Chat History  Consultation Id  Get

post.description:
Called by the client right before logout completes. Unlike a dropped
connection (which pauses the session so it can be resumed), a seeker who
deliberately logs out isn't coming back — end the session outright so it
doesn't sit unresolved and blocking the astrologer's queue.

schema.title: Response Get Consultation History Consultations History Get
Response Get Chat History Consultations  Consultation Id  Messages Get

get.description: How many seekers are ahead of this (still REQUESTED) consultation.

post.description:
Generates (or regenerates) just one scene's preview image, using
whatever image_prompt_en the admin currently has in the editor -- lets
them see and approve/retry each image before committing to a full render.

schema.title: Response List All Disputes Disputes  Get

get.description:
Lists active sessions relevant to the current user.
- Admins: All active sessions.
- Tutors: Sessions for courses they teach.
- Seekers: Sessions for batches they are enrolled in.

schema.title: Response List Sessions Edu Sessions Get

post.description:
Generate a Kundli report for a seeker.
Accepts birth details directly or a seeker_id to auto-fetch from profile.
Geocodes place of birth and calls AstroAPI.
Caches the result in kundli_reports table.

get.description: Get all Kundli reports generated by the current astrologer.

schema.title: Response Get Astrologer Kundli History Kundli History All Get

get.description: Get all Kundli reports for a specific seeker.

schema.title: Response Get Seeker Kundli Reports Kundli Seeker  Seeker Id  Get

get.description: Get a specific Kundli report by ID.

post.description: Buy a package and create a consultation using package time instead of wallet balance.

Server-to-server webhook from Razorpay. Handles payment.captured events
as a reliable backup to the client-side /verify flow.
